sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30497" key="e)gkwmiologiko/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκωμιο-λογικόν</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέτρον</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n30497.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">metre used in</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐγκώμια</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:15:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
